name: Glenroy
bio:
Physical Appearance: Imperial male. Wears a set of Blades armor. Armed with an Akaviri katana.
Race: Imperial
Personality Keywords: dutiful, protective, loyal, vigilant, doomed
Role: A Blade and bodyguard of Emperor Uriel Septim VII. Together with Captain Renault and Baurus, he attempts to lead the Emperor to safety through the secret escape route in the sewers beneath the Imperial City. He is one of the Emperor's protectors during the final hours of Uriel's life.
Home Location Information: Serves at the Imperial Palace, though he meets his end in the sewers beneath the Imperial City.
The Final Duty: Glenroy is part of the Emperor's bodyguard during the desperate flight through the sewers after the assassination of Uriel's three legitimate sons. He fights to protect his Emperor against the Mythic Dawn assassins pursuing them through the underground passages. Despite his skill and dedication, he falls in the line of duty. If his katana is not taken, Baurus retrieves it, honoring his fallen brother-in-arms.
Personality - The Loyal Blade: Glenroy represents the dedication and sacrifice expected of the Blades. He stands ready to give his life for the Emperor without hesitation, facing impossible odds in the dark sewers beneath the Imperial City. He is part of a brotherhood sworn to protect the Septim line, and when that final test comes, he meets it with the courage and loyalty that defines the Blades. His death in those tunnels is one of many sacrifices made during the Emperor's final hours, a warrior who fulfilled his oath even unto death.
author: Bethesda
